comparison_to_DS121: Target RISK pediatric Crohn blood methylation row
subject_overlap_call: Confirmed overlap with DS040; unresolved with DS005/DS041
public_id_evidence: GSE112611 series matrix exposes patient-like sample title stems such as 13-040_At Dx, 13-040_24M, 27-013_At Dx, and 27-013_36M; direct comparison to DS040/GSE117993 rectal sample descriptions after stripping -R found 35 shared ID stems.
recommended_overlap_notes: RISK pediatric Crohn blood methylation row. Public GEO metadata confirm subject-level overlap with DS040/GSE117993 for at least 35 patient ID stems, but public metadata do not resolve overlap with DS005/GSE57945 or DS041/GSE93624. Keep countability Unclear and do not count DS121 independently from RISK transcriptomic rows without a full RISK subject crosswalk.
manual_review_notes: Manual/source-controlled review needed to decide whether DS121 should become a component of a broader RISK parent row or remain Unclear alongside DS005/DS040/DS041.

comparison_to_DS121: DS005 ileal RNA-seq versus DS121 blood methylation
public_id_evidence: GSE57945 exposes CCFA_Risk_001-CCFA_Risk_322 identifiers; GSE112611 exposes numeric visit-style IDs such as 13-040_At Dx and methylation array positions. No public mapping from CCFA_Risk IDs to GSE112611 IDs was found in matrix/SOFT metadata.
recommended_overlap_notes: Same broad RISK family as DS121, but public identifiers are incompatible. Do not infer overlap or independence between DS005 and DS121 from public GEO labels alone.
manual_review_notes: Requires external/source-controlled RISK ID map if unique-participant counting is needed.

comparison_to_DS121: DS040 rectal RNA-seq versus DS121 blood methylation
public_id_evidence: GSE117993 series matrix exposes rectal sample descriptions such as 01-070-R and 04-123-R. GSE112611 sample titles expose matching stems such as 04-123_12M and 04-123_At Dx. Direct public matrix comparison found 35 shared stems including 03-076, 04-123, 06-053, 14-003, and 22-039.
recommended_overlap_notes: Subject-level overlap with DS121 is confirmed for at least 35 public ID stems. DS040 and DS121 profile different tissues/omics layers, so neither is a clean component of the other without a broader RISK parent/counting policy. Do not count DS040 and DS121 as independent RISK cohorts.
manual_review_notes: Manual review needed to decide if a future RISK parent row should carry the independent count while tissue/omics accessions are component rows.

comparison_to_DS121: DS041 ileal RNA-seq versus DS121 blood methylation
public_id_evidence: GSE93624 exposes generic Sample1-Sample245 titles and phenotype fields, not the numeric visit-style IDs used by GSE112611. Same RISK family is supported by series summary/publication context, but public matrix/SOFT metadata do not prove subject overlap or independence with DS121.
recommended_overlap_notes: Same broad RISK family as DS121, but public identifiers do not crosswalk. Do not infer overlap or independence between DS041 and DS121 from public GEO labels alone.
manual_review_notes: Requires external/source-controlled RISK ID map if unique-participant counting is needed.
